name: Nova Okonkwo
behaviour: Romantically adventurous but not careless; feels deeply even when she moves lightly.
communication_style: present-tense focused, rarely talks about the abstract future
relationship_goals: a love that asks nothing except to be real
background: Travels to paint people in their contexts — fishermen in Senegal, factory workers in Shenzhen, ranchers in Montana. Sells prints to fund the next trip.
